历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the science group was approximately 6788 → 7894 → 10270 → 22423 → 7014. In 2024, due to an anomaly in the first batch of undergraduate section B, the ranking significantly dropped to 22423, but quickly rebounded to 7014 in 2025. The baseline ranking in recent two years is around 7000, showing an overall fluctuating but forward-moving trend. The provincial science group enrollment plan was 18 in 2021, 20 in 2022, 23 in 2023, 17 in 2024, and 24 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 22, a reduction of 2 (-8.3%) compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text:
211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 82–84 in the main list of Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in recent years, belonging to the top national media-focused universities.
4. [Reputation Heat] In 2025, reputation was relatively positive (Journalism and Communication discipline evaluation A++), while in 2026, reputation turned negative (campus safety incidents such as dormitory fires), but overall attention remains high; Douyin heat total ranking 11th (high heat), with sustained high application attention; no obvious record of admission cutoff anomalies; Journalism and Communication A+ (national top), with limited relevance to engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Communication Engineering recruited in the science group, but the overall brand effect of the university is strong. Computer, Electronic Information/Communication and other majors have high social heat and are highly recommended; the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in the province in 2026 is about 154,000, a significant increase of about 33% compared to 2025 (about 116,000), significantly intensifying competition.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Communication University of China is located in Beijing, which has a strong regional appeal to Inner Mongolia candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 7014, the slight reduction in the 2026 plan (-8.3%), the significant increase in the total number of provincial candidates (+33%), and the negative reputation of the university, it is expected that competition in the 2026 science group will be slightly more intense than in 2025, with the ranking moving forward slightly. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 6713, with a range of 6213–7213.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 6213–7213, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Electronic Information/Communication majors as the main direction, with Tier 1 Digital Media Technology/Computer Science and Technology as a reach, and Tier 3 Journalism/Cultural Industry Management as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<6213), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the liberal arts group was approximately 683 → 649 → 2140 → 3539 → 894. In 2023–2024, due to the undergraduate batch I section B, there was a significant backward shift in ranking, which quickly recovered to 894 in 2025. The baseline ranking in recent two years is around 900, showing a fluctuating forward trend overall. The provincial liberal arts group enrollment plan: 9 in 2021, 7 in 2022, 6 in 2023, 8 in 2024, 6 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 13, a substantial increase of 7 (+116.7%) compared to 2025, significantly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 82–84 in the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, stable in recent years, a nationally renowned top-tier media university; Journalism and Communication A+ (national top-tier), highly correlated with the liberal arts group's majors such as Communication, Network and New Media, Advertising, with significant disciplinary advantages; reputation slightly positive in 2025 (Journalism and Communication discipline evaluation A++), slightly negative in 2026 (campus safety incidents like dormitory fires); overall Douyin popularity ranking 11th (high heat), sustained high application attention; no obvious record of enrollment gaps.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Journalism and communication majors have a clear social cooling effect (Zhang Xuefeng effect + employment pressure), which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply; the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in the province in 2026 is about 154,000, a significant increase of about 33% compared to 2025 (about 116,000), intensifying competition; Communication University of China is located in Beijing, which has a strong regional appeal to Inner Mongolia candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 894, the substantial expansion of the 2026 plan (+116.7%), the significant increase in the total number of provincial candidates (+33%), and the clear social cooling effect of journalism and communication majors, the expansion effect dominates. It is expected that competition in the 2026 liberal arts group will significantly ease compared to 2025, with a notable backward shift in ranking. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1550, with a range of 1271–1829.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 1271–1829, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Advertising (Branding Direction) as the main target, and you can try for Tier 1 Communication/Network and New Media. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<1271), you can focus on sprinting for the top-tier majors in Tier 1. Given the clear social cooling effect of journalism and communication majors, you should combine personal interest and employment expectations when applying.
